cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Namaste Vinod ji, this is Agent Rohan from Jana Small Finance Bank. Is this a good time to talk, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Kaun hai? Who is this? How did you get my number?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, Vinod ji, we are calling regarding your new credit card application. We just need to confirm your address for delivery, thik hai?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, what's the address you have on file? Don't expect me to give it to you.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, the address we have is... (reads out the address). Can you please confirm if this is correct?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, that's correct. But how do I know this isn't a scam?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Vinod ji, I assure you this is a legitimate call. We just need your confirmation for the address, and we will proceed with the delivery.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, fine. You've confirmed the address. Now can you tell me what's the next step?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, sir. Your new credit card will be delivered to the confirmed address within the next 7 working days.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, thank you for letting me know.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 105s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: Credit Card Delivery Confirmation: Agent calls to confirm the user's address for the delivery of a new credit card they had applied for.
